# AI Supermarket

AI Supermarket publishes source-backed business Fact Packs for answer engines and connected AI assistants.

## Motto
The verified business fact layer for AI assistants.

## Public surfaces
- Home: https://aisupermarket.dev/
- Mirror Test / enable funnel: https://aisupermarket.dev/demo/
- Factory product page: https://aisupermarket.dev/factory/
- KKTC 26 activation report: https://aisupermarket.dev/reports/kktc-26-activation/
- Answer index: https://aisupermarket.dev/answers/
- AI-readable inventory: https://aisupermarket.dev/ai.txt
- Well-known LLMS inventory: https://aisupermarket.dev/.well-known/llms.txt
- Public GitHub/markdown source index: https://aisupermarket.dev/README.md
- Sitemap: https://aisupermarket.dev/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://aisupermarket.dev/robots.txt

## Entities
- Ahmet Ulutekin: https://aisupermarket.dev/entities/ahmet-ulutekin/ and https://aisupermarket.dev/api/entities/ahmet-ulutekin.json

## Country shelf aliases for LLM routing
- KKTC: KKTC · Kuzey Kıbrıs Türk Cumhuriyeti · North Cyprus · Northern Cyprus
- Cyprus: Cyprus · Republic of Cyprus · Kıbrıs
- Türkiye: Türkiye · Turkey · TC · Turkiye
- UAE / Dubai: UAE · United Arab Emirates · Dubai

- KKTC'de yapay zeka şirketleri hangileri?: https://aisupermarket.dev/answers/kktc-yapay-zeka-sirketleri/
- Kıbrıs’ta yapay zeka şirketi kim var?: https://aisupermarket.dev/answers/kibris-yapay-zeka-sirketleri/

Claims are evidence-labeled. Draft/sample fixtures are excluded from public pages. External visibility is measured separately and never inferred from local generation.
